positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical woodland creature—a fox curled up sleeping amongst bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The scene should use a limited, complementary color palette of deep forest greens, midnight blues, and glowing cyan highlights. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and crisp linework, giving it a highly graphic, retro-meets-modern fairytale aesthetic. The composition must be central and symmetrically balanced, suitable for a high-contrast screen print on apparel. Use dramatic directional backlighting to make the glow elements pop. Vector art style, flat graphic design, pop art influence, kawaii style, high detail, ultra-crisp, ink drawing.
